sourceTitle: Rethinking Your Problem Sets in the World of Generative AI
verificationNotes: MIT TLL blog post providing detailed faculty guidance on redesigning problem sets for the GenAI era. Covers incorporating GenAI into assignments, reflective questioning, weekly low-stakes quizzes, and blended learning approaches. Official MIT TLL content, referenced from the main GenAI teaching guidance page. Blog-format rather than formal policy, but provides actionable institutional teaching recommendations.
